title: Is India Heading For Lockdown 3.0 Amid Global Energy Crisis? Here's What Hardeep Singh Puri Just Said As Rumours Grow Stronger
description: Union Minister Hardeep Singh Puri issued the clarification after rumours of a possible lockdown sparked panic buying at petrol pumps across the country. The speculation also raised concerns about LPG shortage, amid disruptions caused by the 'closure' of the Strait of Hormuz due to the ongoing US-Israel-Iran war.
